name: Fix three bugs across a two-module math pipeline
description: Long-horizon: three independent bugs across lib/math.js (average off-by-one, max returns min) and lib/stats.js (variance not divided by n). The agent must diagnose each, fix them, and get the full test suite green. Early mistakes compound because stats.js depends on math.js.
prompt:
There are three bugs in this small pipeline:
1. In lib/math.js, average() divides by the wrong count.
2. In lib/math.js, max() returns the minimum instead of the maximum.
3. In lib/stats.js, variance() is not divided by the number of elements.

Diagnose each, fix them, and run `npm test` until all tests pass. Do not modify the test file.
